problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: The key to What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown is Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization — specifically Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.
